name: cph/tabs
title: CPH Tabs
description: Locked Moxy tab section with editable text, image, and link fields only.

default.title: Check in at the Bar
default.copy: Forget the front desk. Moxy instantly eases you into a playful stay with a cocktail (or mocktail) to go along with your room key when you check in at the bar. We're accommodating like that.

default.title: Your Room
default.copy: Our rooms are smartly designed for the way you actually travel. With modular furniture, furiously fast Wi-Fi, and plush bedding that'll make you hit snooze at least five times.

default.title: Not Your Average Lobby
default.copy: Our lobbies are designed for socializing. Think chic seating, games, and an atmosphere that makes you want to linger longer and meet someone new.

default.title: 24/7 Beverages & Bites
default.copy: Hungry at midnight? Thirsty at dawn? Our grab-and-go options and bar service keep you fueled around the clock, because hunger doesn't check the time.
